narrative:
Lodi Township has 969 registered voters, with 50.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.9 percentage points.
